title: Preview environment deployment
summary: Prepared the demo deployment config for preview environments with branch-scoped review apps and lighter validation.
goal: Make the deployment demo support quick QA preview environments for feature branches.
changesMade: Changed the demo deployment strategy to preview
Added branch-scoped review-app naming and lighter verification

features.name: review app preview rollout
features.why: Enable QA and stakeholders to validate feature branches without promoting directly to production.

decisions.decision: Prefer preview-first validation over production hardening
decisions.why: For branch previews, speed and easy teardown matter more than blue-green production guarantees.

openQuestions: Should preview environments auto-expire after merge or stay until manually removed?
resumePrompt: Continue the preview deployment path. Preserve review-app behavior, qa-preview targeting, and fast validation when resolving conflicts.
